'''Lonus''' was a group of four [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Lonus was part of the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial'' II-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'''s]] [[Corrupter repair convoy|vital resupply convoy]]. They were housed inside the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] [[Monitor (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Monitor'']], which was set to meet with the ''Corrupter'' in the [[Mev system/Legends|Mev system]]. The shuttles contained [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] [[Technician/Legends|technicians]]. The shuttles were then launched in an attempt to reach the ''Corrupter'', but all of the shuttles were destroyed by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. The loss of this technical team, combined with the loss of the convoy, left the ''Corrupter'' stranded and unable to pursue the fleeing Rebels.
